content:
# Recommendations ŌĆö next plan iter (post iter-080)

## State
- Active-cone sorry **4 ŌåÆ 3** (all in `TensorObjInverse.lean`: S3 ~L1185, S4a ~L1221, telescope ~L1989). PresheafDualPullback.lean + SliceTransport.lean sorry-free. `lake build` EXIT 0 (8325 jobs).
- This iter closed bridge (b) `sheafificationCompPullback_restrict` (one-liner; stale "private blocker" comment busted). Genuine progress, honest PARTIAL ŌĆö NOT churn (this is the first iter on the terminal `TensorObjInverse` cone since the dual-flank unblock).

## CRITICAL ŌĆö S3 is the hard core; do NOT re-assign a flat prove round
**S3 `dual_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` will NOT close as a flat `prove` lane.** Both its bridges (b)[iter-080] and (c)[iter-079] are now proven, yet the `case e_╬▓` residual crosses the `restrictFunctor j` source-category instance diamond and every tactic-mode category rewrite fails (prover diagnosed empirically via `lean_multi_attempt`: `rw`/`simp [mapIso_trans]` "did not find pattern"; `erw [map_comp]` misfires on the mate composite; `rw [show ŌĆ” from mapIso_trans]` whnf-bombs at 200k HB). **Required sequence:**
1. **Build the 3 dual-coherence helpers FIRST** (they do not yet exist ŌĆö dispatch a `scaffold` then `prove`, or a `prove` directly, on `TensorObjInverse.lean`):
   - `presheafDualPullbackComparison_pullbackCongr` ŌĆö dual of `pullbackTensorMap_pullbackCongr` (L947): ╬Ė across the `pullbackCongr hj╬╣` leg.
   - `sheafificationCompPullback_restrict_cancel` (`@[reassoc]`, pre-cancelled) ŌĆö dual of `pullbackTensorMap_restrict_cancel` (L972): folds the leading `pullbackComp` of bridge (b).
   - per-leg dual coherence ŌĆö dual of `restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_compat_leg` (L990).
2. **Then assemble S3 in TERM MODE** (`c2_assemble`/`tensorObj_functoriality_comp3` idiom ŌĆö generic single-`[Category C]` lemma applied by `exact`/`refine Eq.trans`, NEVER `rw`/`erw`/`simp` across the seam), `maxHeartbeats` bumped, mirroring S2 (`tensorObj_restrict_iso_restrict_compat`, L1028).
- Consider `effort-breaker` on S3 if the term-mode assembly still proves too large after the 3 helpers land.

## HIGH ŌĆö S4a is partly parallel-able (NOT strictly gated on S3)
- lean-auditor `iter080` flags that the S4a in-code comment ("downstream of the S3 residual") overstates the block: **bridge (b) is now proven**, so S4a `dual_unit_iso_restrict_compat` needs only (i) the SCP composition seam (= bridge (b), done) and (ii) a ╬Ė-unit identification (`presheafDualUnitIso_naturality` promoted to `j`). It can be attempted before S3 fully closes. The partial proof (`simp only [dual_unit_iso, dual_restrict_iso_eq_comparison]`) already exposes the residual. Same term-mode-seam caveat applies.
- telescope `trivialisation_restrict_compat` stays deferred until S3 + S4a land (strict consumer; S2/S4b/S4c already done).

## HIGH ŌĆö blueprint-writer (2 lvb majors, both blueprint-side, non-blocking but do this iter)
- `lem:sheafificationcomppullback_restrict` (`Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex` L7857): **trim `\uses`** to the single real dep `lem:sheafificationcomppullback_comp` ŌĆö the other 3 (`def:restrictcompreindex`, `lem:toringcatsheafhom_comp_hom_reconcile`, `lem:image_preimage_of_le`) are over-credited spurious DAG edges (the realized proof is the one-liner). `% NOTE` added at L7860.
- `lem:dual_restrict_iso_restrict_compat` proof block (L8424): **add an implementation note** (term-mode-assembly obstacle across the source-category diamond) + author **3 new helper blocks** for the dual-coherence bricks named above (so the 1-to-1 LeanŌåötex correspondence stays honest when they land). `% NOTE` added at L8425.
- HARD-GATE status for next prover round on `TensorObjInverse.lean`: lvb returned **0 must-fix** ŌåÆ the gate is currently satisfiable; the 2 majors are quality follow-ups, not blockers. (Consolidated chapter `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex` already cleared the gate iter-078; no chapter content changed except review `% NOTE`s.)

## MEDIUM ŌĆö comment hygiene (opportunistic, prover-owned ŌĆö review cannot edit .lean)
When a prover next touches `TensorObjInverse.lean`, fix the 3 lean-auditor `iter080` minors:
- L1159: "sorry-free iter-079" ŌåÆ "iter-080" (recurring prover off-by-one; PresheafDualPullback c.2 actually closed iter-079 per the review record, but the prover's own comments mislabel iter numbers ŌĆö verify against the review timeline).
- L1155: drop the dangling "the iter-068 BLOCKER notes below are STALE" (those notes no longer exist).
- L1219: soften the S4a "downstream of the S3 residual" over-statement (see HIGH above).

## Blocked ŌĆö do NOT retry without the structural change above
- S3 flat `prove` lane (without the 3 helpers + term-mode assembly) ŌĆö re-hits the seam wall (iter-080 confirmed).
- DEAD probes (carry forward): `rw`/`erw [Category.assoc]`/`simp` of category lemmas across the `SheafOfModules Ōē½` seam; `erw [Functor.map_comp]` on the residual (mis-targets the RFIP mate composite); `rw [show ŌĆ” from Functor.mapIso_trans]` (whnf-bomb). Also still dead globally: `Functor.Monoidal (pullback Žå)` / `pullbackDualMap`; `restrictFunctorComp.hom.naturality`; subst/rcases on `hVU:VŌēżU`; `congr 1`/`Iso.eq_inv_comp`/`Hom.ext`; never `ext` a conjugate goal.

## Coverage debt
- `archon dag-query unmatched` ŌåÆ **0** (no uncovered `lean_aux` nodes this iter; the prover added no new declarations ŌĆö only closed (b) and edited comments). The 3 future S3 helpers will need blueprint blocks when authored (see HIGH).

## Convergence read
- Route is **converging** (1 real sorry eliminated; the remaining 3 are precisely diagnosed with a concrete build-first-then-assemble recipe). No churn signal ŌĆö fresh route, real progress. progress-critic is skippable next plan unless the planner deviates from the build-helpers-first recipe.
